ddls:
CREATE TABLE "influencers" (
  "influencer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each influencer */,
  "influencer_name" TEXT /* Name of the influencer */,
  "main_genre" TEXT /* Main genre of the influencer (e.g., Pop/Rock, Electronic) */,
  "active_start" INTEGER /* Year the influencer became active */,
  "influencer_bio" TEXT /* Brief biography of the influencer */,
  "influencer_location" TEXT /* Location of the influencer */,
  "influencer_social_links" TEXT /* Links to the influencer's social media profiles */,
  "influencer_contact" TEXT /* Contact information for the influencer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("influencer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "followers" (
  "follower_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each follower */,
  "follower_name" TEXT /* Name of the follower */,
  "main_genre" TEXT /* Main genre of the follower (e.g., Pop/Rock, Electronic) */,
  "active_start" INTEGER /* Year the follower became active */,
  "follower_bio" TEXT /* Brief biography of the follower */,
  "follower_location" TEXT /* Location of the follower */,
  "follower_social_links" TEXT /* Links to the follower's social media profiles */,
  "follower_contact" TEXT /* Contact information for the follower */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("follower_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genres" (
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genre */,
  "genre_name" TEXT /* Name of the genre (e.g., Pop/Rock, Electronic) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the genre */,
  "genre_parent" INTEGER /* Parent genre ID for hierarchical genre structures */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "influencer_followers" (
  "relationship_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each relationship */,
  "influencer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the influencer in the relationship */,
  "follower_id" INTEGER /* ID of the follower in the relationship */,
  "relationship_start" INTEGER /* Year the relationship started */,
  "relationship_type" TEXT /* Type of relationship (e.g., fan, mentor, collaborator) */,
  "relationship_strength" INTEGER /* Score indicating the strength of the relationship */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("relationship_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "influencer_genres" (
  "influencer_genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each influencer-genre relationship */,
  "influencer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the influencer */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genre */,
  "influencer_genre_weight" REAL /* Weight indicating the influencer's expertise or focus on the genre */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("influencer_genre_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_influencer_genres_genre_id FOREIGN KEY ("genre_id") REFERENCES genres ("genre_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_influencer_genres_influencer_id FOREIGN KEY ("influencer_id") REFERENCES influencers ("influencer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "follower_genres" (
  "follower_genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each follower-genre relationship */,
  "follower_id" INTEGER /* ID of the follower */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genre */,
  "follower_genre_weight" REAL /* Weight indicating the follower's interest in the genre */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("follower_genre_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_follower_genres_follower_id FOREIGN KEY ("follower_id") REFERENCES followers ("follower_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_follower_genres_genre_id FOREIGN KEY ("genre_id") REFERENCES genres ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "influencer_followers_over_time" (
  "relationship_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each relationship */,
  "influencer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the influencer in the relationship */,
  "follower_id" INTEGER /* ID of the follower in the relationship */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the relationship */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the relationship (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "relationship_end" INTEGER /* Year the relationship ended */,
  "relationship_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the relationship in years */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("relationship_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_influencer_followers_over_time_influencer_id FOREIGN KEY ("influencer_id") REFERENCES influencers ("influencer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_influencer_followers_over_time_follower_id FOREIGN KEY ("follower_id") REFERENCES followers ("follower_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "influencer_collaborations" (
  "collaboration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collaboration */,
  "influencer1_id" INTEGER /* ID of the first influencer in the collaboration */,
  "influencer2_id" INTEGER /* ID of the second influencer in the collaboration */,
  "collaboration_year" INTEGER /* Year of the collaboration */,
  "collaboration_project" TEXT /* Name or description of the collaboration project */,
  "collaboration_type" TEXT /* Type of collaboration (e.g., music, video, podcast) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collaboration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_influencer_collaborations_influencer1_id FOREIGN KEY ("influencer1_id") REFERENCES influencers ("influencer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_influencer_collaborations_influencer2_id FOREIGN KEY ("influencer2_id") REFERENCES influencers ("influencer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "influencer_recommendations" (
  "recommendation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recommendation */,
  "influencer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the influencer receiving the recommendation */,
  "recommended_influencer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the recommended influencer */,
  "recommendation_year" INTEGER /* Year of the recommendation */,
  "recommendation_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the recommendation */,
  "recommendation_status" TEXT /* Status of the recommendation (e.g., accepted, pending) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recommendation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_influencer_recommendations_recommended_influencer_id FOREIGN KEY ("recommended_influencer_id") REFERENCES influencers ("influencer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_influencer_recommendations_influencer_id FOREIGN KEY ("influencer_id") REFERENCES influencers ("influencer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "follower_growth" (
  "growth_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each growth record */,
  "follower_id" INTEGER /* ID of the follower */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the growth */,
  "growth_rate" REAL /* Growth rate of the follower */,
  "growth_method" TEXT /* Method of growth (e.g., social media campaigns, events) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("growth_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_follower_growth_follower_id FOREIGN KEY ("follower_id") REFERENCES followers ("follower_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "influencer_growth" (
  "growth_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each growth record */,
  "influencer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the influencer */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the growth */,
  "growth_rate" REAL /* Growth rate of the influencer */,
  "growth_method" TEXT /* Method of growth (e.g., social media campaigns, events) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("growth_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_influencer_growth_influencer_id FOREIGN KEY ("influencer_id") REFERENCES influencers ("influencer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "clusters" (
  "cluster_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cluster */,
  "influencer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the influencer in the cluster */,
  "follower_id" INTEGER /* ID of the follower in the cluster */,
  "cluster_year" INTEGER /* Year of the cluster */,
  "cluster_type" TEXT /* Type of cluster (e.g., genre-based, location-based) */,
  "cluster_size" INTEGER /* Size of the cluster */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cluster_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_clusters_influencer_id FOREIGN KEY ("influencer_id") REFERENCES influencers ("influencer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_clusters_follower_id FOREIGN KEY ("follower_id") REFERENCES followers ("follower_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cluster_recommendations" (
  "recommendation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recommendation */,
  "cluster_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cluster receiving the recommendation */,
  "recommended_influencer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the recommended influencer */,
  "recommendation_year" INTEGER /* Year of the recommendation */,
  "recommendation_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the recommendation */,
  "recommendation_status" TEXT /* Status of the recommendation (e.g., accepted, pending) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recommendation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cluster_recommendations_recommended_influencer_id FOREIGN KEY ("recommended_influencer_id") REFERENCES influencers ("influencer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cluster_recommendations_cluster_id FOREIGN KEY ("cluster_id") REFERENCES clusters ("cluster_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "influencer_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "influencer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the influencer making the comment */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "comment_year" INTEGER /* Year of the comment */,
  "comment_platform" TEXT /* Platform where the comment was made */,
  "comment_engagement" INTEGER /* Engagement metrics (e.g., likes, shares) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_influencer_comments_influencer_id FOREIGN KEY ("influencer_id") REFERENCES influencers ("influencer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "follower_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "follower_id" INTEGER /* ID of the follower making the comment */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "comment_year" INTEGER /* Year of the comment */,
  "comment_platform" TEXT /* Platform where the comment was made */,
  "comment_engagement" INTEGER /* Engagement metrics (e.g., likes, shares) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_follower_comments_follower_id FOREIGN KEY ("follower_id") REFERENCES followers ("follower_id")
)
